title: RuneContextChangeDraftArtifact
description: Typed RuneContext change-draft artifact contract for artifact-first generation before promote/apply.

data_class.description: Draft artifacts remain in the shared spec_text data class.

change_id.description: Authoritative RuneContext change identity this draft targets.

artifact_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for the generated draft artifact payload.

source_prompt_identity_digest.description: Canonical digest identity for the operator/broker-reviewed source prompt identity bound to the draft.

validated_project_substrate_digest.description: Optional validated project substrate digest identity bound when substrate checks are present.

gate_evidence_digests.description: Optional ordered gate-evidence digest identities that justify this draft output.
